name: zyket
description: Comprehensive skills for building Zyket backends.

skills.name: zyket-overview
skills.description: Overview of the Zyket framework, its architecture and project structure

skills.name: zyket-routes
skills.description: How to create and configure Express HTTP routes in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-middlewares
skills.description: How to create Express middlewares in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-database
skills.description: How to define Sequelize models and run database migrations in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-events
skills.description: How to create and emit events in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-workers
skills.description: How to create BullMQ workers and manage job queues in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-scheduler
skills.description: How to create cron-based scheduled tasks in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-socketio
skills.description: How to create Socket.IO handlers and guards in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-auth
skills.description: How to set up authentication using better-auth in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-services
skills.description: How to use built-in services (cache, S3, logger) and create custom services in Zyket

skills.name: zyket-extensions
skills.description: How to create and use extensions in Zyket

commands.name: handler
commands.description: Create a new Socket.IO event handler
